narrative: Applied ML Engineer with seven years of experience at Rephrase.ai, a product‑focused startup. Their strong JD‑relevant skill match—particularly hands‑on work with Milvus, BM25 and LoRA‑based NLP models—drives the primary ranking boost. They have built retrieval pipelines using TensorFlow and fine‑tuned large language models via PEFT, directly aligning with the Search & Retrieval focus of the role. Experience level sits squarely in the 5‑9 year band, and while based in Delhi they are within reasonable commuting distance to Pune/Noida. A minor caveat is limited visibility into notice period and a small credibility flag on their profile.
